backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining the jewellery order management system with types and state for orders, design mappings, karigars, and RB summaries, plus shared functions for registering karigars, saving orders, querying orders, and supplying/splitting orders.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (grouped design-code layouts, ageing badges, DesignImageModal integration, etc.) to their source files, components, and test IDs with confidence ratings.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON dictionary of short per-file summaries describing the purpose and key changes of every frontend source file in the project.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining CSS custom property design tokens for light and dark themes (colors, radius, sidebar, charts).
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the React SPA, mounting the app into a `#root` div and loading the TypeScript entry point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with all application routes (dashboard, ingest, unmapped codes, master designs, design images, tag printing, barcode scanning, karigar detail, reconciliation, ageing stock), wraps the app in QueryClient and ThemeProvider, and renders the sidebar layout.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/Custom: Dashboard tab that filters all orders to CO-type Pending orders and renders them in an OrderTable with a search input filtering by order number, design code, or generic name.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/Design: A modal dialog component that displays a zoomable and pannable design image fetched by design code, with loading/error states and zoom controls.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/Hallma: Dashboard tab showing orders in Hallmark status, grouped by design code with filtering, bulk status updates, Excel export, and a design image modal.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/Kariga: Dashboard tab that groups pending orders by karigar (artisan) into cards showing order count and total weight, with navigation to a per-karigar detail page.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/OrderT: Reusable table component for displaying orders with optional bulk selection, mark-as-ready actions, delete, and multi-format export (Excel/PDF/JPEG).
frontend/src/components/dashboard/ReadyT: Dashboard tab displaying Ready-status orders grouped by design code, with search/filter controls, expand/collapse rows, and a return-to-pending action.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/Summar: Displays summary metric cards (order count, weight, quantity, CO orders) computed from all orders and adapted to the currently active dashboard tab.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/Suppli: A dialog component for batch-supplying RB orders, allowing users to enter supplied quantities per order with validation, progress display, and partial supply warnings.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/TotalO: A dashboard tab that displays pending orders grouped by design code, with filtering by order type/karigar/search, and supports marking orders as ready or supplying RB orders.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/Unmapp: An alert section that fetches and displays unmapped design codes (missing generic or karigar name), grouped with counts, and provides navigation links to fix them.
frontend/src/components/layout/AppSideba: The application sidebar with navigation links to all major pages and a data reset action that opens a confirmation dialog.
frontend/src/components/layout/DataReset: A confirmation alert dialog that permanently deletes all active (Pending, Ready, Return from Hallmark) orders via a reset mutation.
frontend/src/components/masterdesigns/Ed: A modal dialog for editing a design's karigar assignment, supporting selection from existing karigars or adding a new one, and saving the updated mapping.
frontend/src/components/tagprinting/Webv: An empty file with no content.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using the current Internet Identity, invalidating dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication on the ICP platform, managing login state, identity persistence, and AuthClient lifecycle.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines TanStack Query hooks for all backend actor interactions, including CRUD operations for orders, design mappings, master data, and external blobs.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet using Tailwind CSS with OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark themes, including color tokens for gold, sidebar, and chart variables.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers.
frontend/src/pages/AgeingStock.tsx: Page component that displays pending orders grouped by design with age-band color coding (green/yellow/red), supporting bulk selection and marking orders as ready.
frontend/src/pages/BarcodeScanning.tsx: Page component supporting both hardware barcode scanner input and camera-based QR scanning to collect order IDs and batch-update their status.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: Main dashboard page that renders summary cards and a tabbed view of orders broken down by total, ready, hallmark, customer, and karigar categories.
frontend/src/pages/DesignImages.tsx: Page component for uploading design images to the backend, supporting both folder selection and ZIP file extraction with batch processing and progress tracking.
frontend/src/pages/IngestOrders.tsx: Page component for uploading an Excel file of orders, parsing it with a utility, and saving each order sequentially to the backend canister with error reporting.
frontend/src/pages/KarigarDetail.tsx: Detail page for a specific karigar showing their pending orders, with support for exporting orders as PDF/JPEG/Excel and marking orders as ready or supplying RB orders.
frontend/src/pages/MasterDesigns.tsx: Page for uploading and managing master design-to-karigar mappings via Excel, displaying the mapping table, and allowing editing of individual design assignments.
frontend/src/pages/Reconciliation.tsx: Page for uploading a master Excel file, parsing and reconciling its rows against existing orders, and persisting matched master data rows to the backend.
frontend/src/pages/TagPrinting.tsx: A page component for tag printing that displays ready orders grouped by design code, supports date range filtering, and allows bulk status updates with hallmark confirmation dialog.
frontend/src/pages/UnmappedCodes.tsx: A page component that lists orders missing generic name or karigar mappings, grouped by design code, with inline editing to update or reassign design mappings.
frontend/src/utils/ageingBadge.tsx: Exports an AgeingBadge React component that displays the number of days since an order date with color-coded styling (green ≤14d, amber ≤29d, red 30d+).
frontend/src/utils/excelParser.ts: Provides utility functions to parse order and design data from Excel files, handling Indian locale DD/MM/YYYY dates, Excel serial numbers, and normalizing design codes and header names.
frontend/src/utils/exportUtils.ts: Provides exportToExcel and exportToPDF functions that convert order data into downloadable Excel or PDF files, with PDF export fetching and embedding design images grouped by design code.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining dark mode, custom color tokens using OKLCH CSS variables, extended font families, border radius, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Tracks the current state of a dashboard project at version 3, documenting implemented features (grouped design code rows, filters/search, image modal) across Total Orders, Ready, and Hallmark tabs, along with known issues and architectural notes.
